channel.title: Shimano on Mizubikes
channel.description: Recent content in Shimano on Mizubikes

item.title: Why I'm Finally Thinking About Switching to SRAM
item.description: I've been on Shimano Ultegra since the R8100 launched. Here's why SRAM Force E1 is finally making me reconsider.

item.title: Factor Ostro VAM V2 Build
item.description: A full custom build of the Factor Ostro VAM V2 — lightweight aero road bike with Shimano Di2, Quarq power meter, BTLos wheels, and a custom 3D printed headset spacer.
